bench_setup.notes: I2C1 master (PB6=SCL, PB7=SDA) ↔ I2C2 slave (PB10=SCL, PB3=SDA AF9). PB3 used as I2C2_SDA because PB11 is not on the BlackPill connector. Wiring: PB6↔PB10, PB7↔PB3 (2 jumper wires). Pull-up: STM32 internal ~40 kΩ (PUPDR=01), no external resistors. SM 100 kHz. Master writes 4 bytes {0xA1,0xB2,0xC3,0xD4} to slave (addr 0x42), then reads them back. FAIL error_code=1..10 indicates which I2C step timed out; error_code=11 means data mismatch (detail0=matched count).

peripheral_signals.notes: I2C1_SCL (PB6, AF4) ↔ I2C2_SCL (PB10, AF4). Wire: PB6↔PB10.
I2C1_SDA (PB7, AF4) ↔ I2C2_SDA (PB3, AF9). Wire: PB7↔PB3. PB3 is the alternate I2C2_SDA pin (AF9) since PB11 is not on the connector.
